---
title: "Beatrice Henrietta Heathcote"
---

## Beatrice Henrietta Heathcote

**Dates:** (1856-1909)

### Description

twin daughter of Sir William Heathcote

### Letters

- [To Beatrice Henrietta Heathcote, Feb 11 [1898]](../letters/3371_To_Beatrice_Henrietta_Heathcote.html)
- Letter from Jan 29th [1898?]
- Letter from Aug 22 [1897]
- Letter from December 30 [1871]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
